data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the payment going to the wrong business.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where a payment goes to the wrong business. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this scenario, nor does it demonstrate how the system handles such a case. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address this specific scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the handling of payments going to the wrong business.
